creator: Meyser+bugs.freebsd.org@xenet.de
text:
updated src (de53ebb0f20e) / doc / ports

installed new world/kernel on host / samba jail.

updated all packages.

Problem persists!

Network dump reveals:

writes are working but extremly slow! about 250B/s. 

for fun I set up ftpd inside the jail.

result:

transfer jail to outside 1G data no Problem
transfer outside to jail timeout during transfer.

seems to be a problem in base system ( bridge / epair ... )
